inputs.label: Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: The volumetric flow rate of the fluid through the pump.

businessContext_i18n.en: The volumetric flow rate of the fluid through the pump.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der volumetrische Durchfluss des Fluids durch die Pumpe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit volumétrique du fluide à travers la pompe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal volumétrico del fluido a través de la bomba.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل التدفق الحجمي للسائل عبر المضخة.

inputs.label: Total Head
inputs.businessContext: The total dynamic head, i.e., the height to which the fluid is pumped.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total dynamic head, i.e., the height to which the fluid is pumped.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam dinamik basma yüksekliği, yani akışkanın pompalandığı yükseklik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gesamte dynamische Förderhöhe, d.h. die Höhe, auf die das Fluid gepumpt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur manométrique totale, c'est-à-dire la hauteur à laquelle le fluide est pompé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura dinámica total, es decir, la altura a la que se bombea el fluido.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرأس الديناميكي الكلي، أي الارتفاع الذي يتم ضخ السائل إليه.

inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: The mass density of the fluid. Default value is for water at 20°C.

businessContext_i18n.en: The mass density of the fluid. Default value is for water at 20°C.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkanın kütle yoğunluğu. Varsayılan değer 20°C'deki su içindir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Massendichte des Fluids. Standardwert für Wasser bei 20°C.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique du fluide. La valeur par défaut est pour l'eau à 20°C.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad másica del fluido. El valor predeterminado es para agua a 20°C.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكثافة الكتلية للسائل. القيمة الافتراضية للماء عند 20 درجة مئوية.

inputs.label: Pump Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: The hydraulic efficiency of the pump (from manufacturer curve). Enter as percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The hydraulic efficiency of the pump (from manufacturer curve). Enter as percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompanın hidrolik verimliliği (üretici eğrisinden). Yüzde olarak girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der hydraulische Wirkungsgrad der Pumpe (aus Herstellerkennlinie). Als Prozentsatz eingeben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement hydraulique de la pompe (d'après la courbe du fabricant). Saisir en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia hidráulica de la bomba (según curva del fabricante). Ingrese como porcentaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكفاءة الهيدروليكية للمضخة (من منحنى الشركة المصنعة). أدخل كنسبة مئوية.

inputs.label: Motor Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: The efficiency of the electric motor driving the pump. Enter as percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The efficiency of the electric motor driving the pump. Enter as percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompayı çalıştıran elektrik motorunun verimliliği. Yüzde olarak girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Wirkungsgrad des Elektromotors, der die Pumpe antreibt. Als Prozentsatz eingeben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement du moteur électrique entraînant la pompe. Saisir en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del motor eléctrico que acciona la bomba. Ingrese como porcentaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة المحرك الكهربائي الذي يشغل المضخة. أدخل كنسبة مئوية.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
